text: I've been a bit tired and anxious about it, wanted to get checked.
label: gastroenteritis/discharge

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 9 day(s), deteriorating, though I think I'm slowly getting better. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 12 day(s) and scared. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 4 day(s) ago.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 2 day(s) ago, not getting better, not getting worse.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 9 day(s) of this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in.
label: influenza/mild

text: I've had a vague sense of fatigue, thought I'd get it checked out.
label: non-infectious

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in.
label: influenza/mild

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 6 day(s), and it feels like it might be turning a corner. I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: non-infectious

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 10 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: pneumonia/moderate
